eas_text: A civil authority has issued A FIRE WARNING for the following counties or areas: Chelan, WA; at 1:25 PM on JUL 12, 2026 Effective until 3:25 PM. Message from WSLF/CAP.
extra_text:
Chelan County Sheriff WILDFIRE WARNING, Level 3 Evacuation Order in Lake Chelan. The affected area is Willmorth Drive. Leave now.  Roads and evacuation routes can get blocked. If you don't leave now, you may be trapped, injured, or killed. CHECK Local media or the Chelan County Emergency Management Web site and Face book. 
Repeat.
Chelan County Sheriff WILDFIRE WARNING, Level 3 Evacuation Order in Lake Chelan. The affected area is Willmorth Drive. Leave now. Roads and  evacuation routes can get blocked. If you don't leave now, you may be trapped, injured, or killed. CHECK Local media or the Chelan County Emergency Management Web site and Face book. You will be kept advised as conditions change.  Please monitor local radio stations and Shelan County Emergency Management Face book for updates.
